subcodes.first_line: O thou chief scribe! Blessed is the moment when thou didst become an intimate companion in the Cause of the True One, and happy the hour when the crown of love for the Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منشی باشی خرم دمی که براز حق همدم شدی و مبارک ساعتی که تاج محبت اسم اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
